notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brett Baty. Jackson Merrill to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error

notableEvents.label: Ty France GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Jared Young. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.
